name: Portfolio
description: Showcase your work beautifully with a project grid, about section, and contact form.
ai_context: This is a single-page static portfolio website (HTML/CSS/JS, no build tools). Sections: hero (name, title, intro), projects grid (6 sample projects with CSS gradient placeholders — user should replace with real screenshots by adding tags), about (bio + skills with animated progress bars), and contact form (saves to localStorage). CSS custom properties in :root for easy rebranding. Project cards have hover overlay effects with title and description. Filter buttons let visitors sort projects by category. The user will likely ask to: replace gradient placeholders with real images, change name/bio/titles, add or remove projects, change color scheme, add a blog, add animations, connect a real contact backend, add a resume download, add social links, etc.
